content.en:
From the situation that he had spied on the copying talent, he knew that the other party was called the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor.

"I've seen the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said politely.

"Oh, you actually know me?" the Blood-robed Heavenly Ancestor was a little surprised.

However, he didn't care.

"What is the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor doing here to Silence the Black Sea?" Ye Tian asked.

"You have the Golden Muscle Fluid in your hands!" the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor said bluntly, "Give me all the Golden Muscle Fluid in your hands!"

Ye Tian was taken aback, the other Heavenly Ancestors in the Wanlong Territorial Sea didn't know about the existence of the Golden Muscle Fluid, and he only learned the name Golden Muscle Fluid in the territory of the King Kong Snake Clan.

Obviously, the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor had been staying in the territorial sea boundary before, so he knew about the golden muscle fluid, and he was very familiar with the golden muscle fluid, otherwise it would be impossible to know that he had the golden muscle fluid on his hands.

"It should be the Golden Liquid Energy Sea that exposes the existence of the Golden Muscle Fluid!"

Ye Tian guessed in his heart.

"Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor, even if I have the Golden Muscle Fluid in my hand, why do I want to give it to you?" Ye Tian said in a deep voice.

"Because of strength!"

The Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor showed his strength in the Three Blood Transformation Realms.

At the moment, the atmosphere is very deadlocked, and a battle can break out at any time.

Ye Tian was not afraid of the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor, but he didn't want to implicate the Silent Black Sea, not to mention that his family was still in the Silent Black Sea.

So, he immediately said: "It's not impossible to give it to you, but the golden muscle fluid I found has been used up, and the location of the golden muscle fluid is located in a dangerous place in the boundary gap of the territorial waters, and I can only snatch some of it out at a time." I can take you there, but afterwards, we'll split it evenly, how about it?"

"Good!"

The Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor was excited in his heart.

Listening to Ye Tian's tone, there seems to be a lot of golden muscle fluid there, and if you find it there, you can get a large amount of golden muscle fluid.

As for the deuce, is it possible?

"When are you going?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Now!"

The Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor didn't want to waste time, so he immediately urged.

Immediately, Ye Tian and the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor immediately went to the territorial sea boundary seam.

......

After the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor left with this replica body, Ye Tian began to transfer a part of the Terran race, lest his plan be unsuccessful, and the Silent Black Sea would suffer retaliation.

Of course, if the plan goes well, the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor will definitely die.

Territorial sea boundary seam.

Ye Tian and the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor shuttled here, constantly advancing in a certain direction.

During this period, they were cautious, also worried about encountering powerful Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

Vajra Territory area.

Ye Tian found two lone Blood Transformation Realm Vajra Snakes, exerted his strength, quickly killed them, and then copied the body of one of the Vajra Snakes.

Then, he found other Blood Transformation Realm Vajra snakes, and spread the news that there were foreign Blood Transformation Realm creatures hunting in the vicinity.

Suddenly, the Vajra Snake clan was furious.

And.

It was learned that the perpetrators were two Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, one was a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor once, and the other was a Third Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

Suddenly, a large number of Blood Transformation Realm Vajra Snakes were dispatched to search for the traces of these two Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

And Ye Tian also joined the tracking team as a vajra snake, and soon summoned the other vajra snakes, saying that he had found the traces of the other party and that the other party was fleeing.

As a result, the other Vajra snakes chased and killed in the direction of Ye Tian's communication.

......

"The Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor never thought that I would use the Vajra Snake Clan to kill him!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, if he did this, his replica body would definitely fall, but it would be nothing to lose him.

Time passed slowly, and the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor was a little anxious.

"How far is it?"

The Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor asked.

"It's almost there, and I was also accidentally washed there by the shock current, and the distance is naturally not close!" Ye Tian said.

The Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor identified the direction and knew that if he continued to move forward in this direction, he would reach the territory of the Vajra Snake Clan, but at this moment, it was still far away from the Vajra Snake Clan, so it was unlikely that he would encounter the Vajra Snake Clan.

"It's coming soon!"

Ye Tian said.

At this time, the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor's face showed a look of excitement.

But at this moment, a blood transformation realm Vajra snake appeared here.

"How can there be a Vajra Snake here? It should be a Vajra Snake that came out and wandered around!" the Blood-robed Heavenly Ancestor guessed.

"There is a Vajra snake in front, the Vajra snake clan is very powerful, don't provoke them, leave quickly!"

The Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor wanted to leave, but Ye Tian didn't want to leave.

"It's just a blood transformation realm vajra snake!

Ye Tian shuttled directly and hit this King Kong snake hard with one blow.

In fact, this Vajra snake was Ye Tian's own copy body, and he did it on purpose.

In the meantime, the other Vajra snakes have gotten the news and are on their way quickly.

"You're crazy, you can't kill the Vajra snake!"

The Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor's face changed drastically.

"Good!"

Ye Tian didn't really kill his copy body, he just deliberately delayed a little time.

"Almost!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

They hadn't gone far yet, and there were a lot of Blood Transformation Realm Vajra Snakes around them, and there were both Second Blood Transformation Realm and Third Blood Transformation Realm.

At the same time, Ye Tian's Vajra Snake Replica Body also rushed up with a seriously injured body.

"It's the two of them!"

The Vajra snake said as a copy of its body.

"Kill them!"

The Blood Transformation Realm Vajra Snake made a move.

"What's the situation?"

The Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor was stunned.

Isn't it just to injure a Vajra snake, and it is still in an area far away from the territory of the Vajra snake, why did so many Vajra snakes suddenly appear?

The point is, this matter has nothing to do with him at all!

Among them, the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor was a three-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, so he suffered key treatment and was besieged by many three-time Blood Transformation Realm Vajra snakes.

Thundered!!!!

The Great War begins.

And Ye Tian didn't show his true strength at all, so even if he was besieged by a group of Second Blood Transformation Realm Vajra Snakes, he didn't fall immediately.

He has to wait for the Blood-robed Heavenly Ancestor to fall!

At this moment, the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor thought about it for a while, and quickly guessed the reason.

In addition, the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor told him that Ye Tian had a clone.

"Damn, Endless Heavenly Ancestor, you trick me !!!"

Obviously, Ye Tian was going to fall with him at the cost of his clone.

It's a pity that he was attracted by the temptation of the golden muscle fluid, so he didn't notice the existence of the trap.

In fact, he didn't think that Ye Tian had the strength to pit him.

It's just that he still doesn't know why the Vajra Snake Clan is here, and it happens to surround him.

It stands to reason that Ye Tian doesn't have time to prepare, and he doesn't have time to attract the Vajra Snake clan!

Soon, he was severely wounded, and finally died at the hands of these Three Blood Transformation Realm Vajra Snakes.

And Ye Tian didn't resist, he blew himself up directly, and even the King Kong snake copy body that affected him fell together, and there was no evidence.

Even if the Vajra Snake clan found out that something was wrong, they wouldn't be able to find out anything.
